sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_caps (cap UInt64, radius Float64);
SELECT s2CapUnion(cap, radius) AS capUnion FROM geo_caps;
UPDATE geo_caps SET radius = radius + 0.5 WHERE cap = 3814912406305146967;
SELECT s2CapUnion(3814912406305146967, radius, 1157347770437378819, 1.5) AS enrichedCapUnion FROM geo_caps;
